description: Bridge ScannedCLITool to apcore-toolkit ScannedModule. Create src/adapter/ with converter, schema, and annotation modules.

tasks.title: Add apcore-toolkit dependency and create adapter module skeleton
tasks.description: Add apcore-toolkit as path dependency. Create src/adapter/mod.rs with sub-module declarations. Register in lib.rs.
tasks.test_first: Write a compile test that imports apcore_toolkit::ScannedModule and constructs one via ScannedModule::new(). Verify cargo test --lib passes.
tasks.implementation: Add apcore-toolkit = { path = '../apcore-toolkit-rust' } to Cargo.toml. Create src/adapter/mod.rs (pub mod converter; pub mod schema; pub mod annotations;). Create empty src/adapter/converter.rs, schema.rs, annotations.rs. Add 'pub mod adapter;' to lib.rs.
tasks.acceptance: cargo build succeeds. apcore_toolkit::ScannedModule is importable.

tasks.title: Adapter schema: build_input_schema (extract from schema_gen.rs)
tasks.description: Extract input schema generation from src/binding/schema_gen.rs into src/adapter/schema.rs as a standalone function build_input_schema(command, global_flags) -> Value.
tasks.test_first: Write tests: test_schema_string_flag, test_schema_boolean_flag, test_schema_enum_flag, test_schema_required_flag, test_schema_repeatable_flag, test_schema_positional_arg, test_schema_variadic_arg, test_schema_global_flags_included. Mirror existing schema_gen tests but call the new function.
tasks.implementation: Copy the value_type_to_json_schema(), flag_to_schema(), arg_to_schema() logic from schema_gen.rs into adapter/schema.rs as standalone functions. Rename entry point to pub fn build_input_schema(command: &ScannedCommand, global_flags: &[ScannedFlag]) -> Value. Merge global_flags into command flags.
tasks.acceptance: All 8 schema tests pass. Output matches existing SchemaGenerator behavior.

tasks.title: Adapter schema: build_output_schema
tasks.description: Extract output schema generation into adapter/schema.rs as build_output_schema(command) -> Value.
tasks.test_first: Write test_schema_output_json (structured output) and test_schema_output_raw (no structured output).
tasks.implementation: Add pub fn build_output_schema(command: &ScannedCommand) -> Value to adapter/schema.rs. Use command.structured_output to decide schema shape.

tasks.title: Adapter annotations: infer(command) -> ModuleAnnotations
tasks.description: Implement annotation inference that maps command names to apcore::ModuleAnnotations fields (readonly, destructive, idempotent, requires_approval, cacheable, streaming=false).
tasks.test_first: Write tests: test_annotations_list_is_readonly, test_annotations_delete_is_destructive, test_annotations_create_is_write, test_annotations_get_is_idempotent, test_annotations_readonly_is_cacheable, test_annotations_unknown_defaults.
tasks.implementation: Create pub fn infer(command: &ScannedCommand) -> ModuleAnnotations in adapter/annotations.rs. Define READONLY_PATTERNS, DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS, IDEMPOTENT_PATTERNS as const arrays. Match command.name against patterns. Set cacheable = readonly && idempotent. streaming = false always.

tasks.title: CliToolConverter: basic single-command tool conversion
tasks.description: Implement CliToolConverter::new() and convert() for the simplest case: a tool with no subcommands produces a single ScannedModule.
tasks.test_first: Write test_converter_single_command_tool (ffmpeg-like tool with no subcommands) -> 1 ScannedModule with module_id 'cli.ffmpeg', correct description, tags, target, version.
tasks.implementation: Create CliToolConverter struct with namespace field (default 'cli'). Implement convert() that walks the subcommand tree. For leaf commands, build ScannedModule using adapter/schema and adapter/annotations. Handle the root-only case (no subcommands).
tasks.acceptance: Single-command conversion test passes with correct module_id, tags, target format.

tasks.title: CliToolConverter: subcommand tree flattening
tasks.description: Handle tools with subcommands. Each leaf command produces a ScannedModule. Nested subcommands produce dot-separated module_ids.
tasks.test_first: Write test_converter_tool_with_subcommands (3 leaf subcommands -> 3 modules), test_converter_nested_subcommands (docker container ls -> cli.docker.container.ls), test_converter_deeply_nested (3 levels).
tasks.implementation: Add recursive walk_commands() helper that collects leaf commands with their full path. For each leaf, construct module_id as namespace.tool_name.path.parts.
tasks.acceptance: All subcommand tests pass. Correct number of modules, correct module_ids.

tasks.title: CliToolConverter: metadata, warnings, examples, documentation
tasks.description: Populate metadata (scan_tier, help_format, binary_path), warnings, documentation (raw_help), and examples on ScannedModule.
tasks.test_first: Write test_converter_metadata_populated, test_converter_warnings_propagated, test_converter_version_present, test_converter_version_missing, test_converter_tags_include_help_format, test_converter_tags_structured_output.
tasks.implementation: In the convert loop, populate module.metadata with scan_tier, help_format, binary_path. Set documentation from raw_help. Copy examples as empty Vec (ScannedCommand.examples are strings, not ModuleExample). Copy warnings from tool and command levels.

tasks.title: CliToolConverter: custom namespace, convert_all, From trait
tasks.description: Add with_namespace(), convert_all(), and impl From<&ScannedCLITool> for Vec<ScannedModule>.
tasks.test_first: Write test_converter_custom_namespace ('myns' prefix), test_converter_convert_all (two tools), test_converter_from_trait (From trait gives same result).
tasks.implementation: Add with_namespace constructor. convert_all iterates tools and calls convert. From trait delegates to CliToolConverter::new().convert().

tasks.title: Edge cases and quality gates
tasks.description: Handle edge cases: empty tool, empty description fallback, deduplication. Run fmt + clippy + full test suite.
tasks.test_first: Write test_converter_empty_tool (tool with no subcommands, no flags -> valid single module), test_converter_empty_description_fallback (empty description -> 'Execute {command}').
tasks.implementation: Add fallback for empty description. Ensure all edge cases are handled. Run cargo fmt, cargo clippy -D warnings, cargo test --all-features.
tasks.acceptance: All tests pass. fmt clean. clippy clean. Full suite green.
